title: Rename `CLIMACORE_DISTRIBUTED` to `CLIMACOMMS_CONTEXT`

title: Remove `CLIMACOMMS_CONTEXT` if cxt is specified

body:
Since we switched to using CUDA-aware MPI everywhere, we should disable the warning on CPU runs.

- [ ] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [ ] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [ ] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [ ] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: disable libcuda warning on CPU runs

body:
This PR adds the datalayout eltype to the DSSBuffer type, so that we can assert that the same type is used when dss-ing fields. Otherwise, this can lead to OOB errors (when using `--check-bounds=yes`) or seg-faults (without `--check-bounds=yes`).

I ran into this when debugging #1295.
title: Protect dss against incorrect buffer
